---
title: "AD698 - Applied Generative AI"
subtitle: "Agentic AI: A Theoretical Framework for Building Autonomous Systems"
number-sections: true
date: "2024-11-21"
date-modified: today
date-format: long
engine: jupyter
categories: ['M06:', 'Lab']
description: "Hands-on lab for Module 6 focused on Agentic AI: A Theoretical Framework for Building Autonomous Systems."
---

# Lab Overview

This lab should follow the same lightweight course pattern:

1. Setup
2. Core task blocks
3. Validation after each major step
4. Short interpretation or reflection

## Lab Validation Standard

Students should show intermediate evidence, not only final answers. Good checks include workflow traces, tool outputs, comparison tables, or short failure notes when relevant.

If this lab requires a written memo, reflection, or report in addition to the notebook, format that written deliverable in **APA 7**.
